name: @loadout/plugin-tdp-control
description: TDP (Thermal Design Power) control for Linux handhelds — adjust wattage via ryzenadj or sysfs

plugin.name: TDP Control
plugin.description: Adjust CPU/APU TDP wattage with presets and a slider

bundled_bins.name: ryzenadj
bundled_bins.rationale: AMD-only SMU write tool; required on stock SteamOS where ryzenadj isn't packaged (/usr is read-only). ~104 KB, dynamic-links libpci/libudev/libcap which are present on every supported distro.

plugin.subtitle: CPU/GPU power limits
